lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are flawless with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order and has been meticulously maintained.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and extensive rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and broken trim pieces. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs and is not currently in reliable operating condition.

This vehicle is in exceptional, showroom-quality condition, truly a rare find. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine and absolutely no scratches, dents, or chips. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state, with the upholstery showing zero signs of wear or creasing. Mechanically, the car is perfect; the engine runs silently and powerfully, and the transmission shifts with factory-level precision. Every electronic feature and luxury amenity works exactly as intended. It has been meticulously garaged and comes with a complete, documented service history. This is a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks.

Prepare to be impressed by this absolute gem! This car is in pristine, mint condition and has been kept in showroom-ready shape, looking virtually brand new inside and out. It’s a rare opportunity to own a perfectly preserved vehicle that drives as beautifully as it looks.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver, though it does show signs of its age and mileage. The exterior paint has some fading on the hood and a few minor door dings, while the interior shows moderate wear on the upholstery and carpets. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, but you should expect to address a minor oil seep and some upcoming suspension work to maintain its ride quality. The tires have about 40% tread remaining. It is a functional and honest vehicle that would be perfect for a commute, provided the buyer is comfortable with a few cosmetic flaws and routine maintenance needs.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical upkeep and a refined aesthetic, this unit offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-term reliability. Each system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and cabin comfort.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in wonderful shape, runs smoothly, and has been really well-loved. Whether you need a reliable daily driver or something for those fun weekend getaways, this car is ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you’re going to love it!

Available is a mechanically sorted E46 M3, powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing. This example utilizes a 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential for precise power delivery. Recent preventative maintenance includes subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive cooling system overhaul. The chassis remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers, ensuring sharp turn-in and high-speed stability. While displaying minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver’s car, the drivetrain is robust and the performance envelope remains intact. A turn-key enthusiast example ready for the B-roads.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Reliable daily driver.

Presenting a meticulously maintained 2018 Luxury Sport SUV that perfectly balances performance and comfort. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that still catches the light beautifully, with only minor cosmetic stone chips on the front bumper consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, though it shows light, natural creasing on the driver’s side bolster. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the dual-zone climate control and navigation system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this vehicle is sound; it has a complete service record, a recent fluid flush, and the premium tires offer plenty of seasons ahead. It has been kept in a smoke-free, pet-free environment and is ready for its next owner to drive away with total confidence.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies automotive integrity and reliable performance. This specimen has been subjected to rigorous inspections to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical soundness and aesthetic preservation. Featuring a well-appointed interior and a robust powertrain, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional. A comprehensive service history is available, affirming its consistent care and operational excellence.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable mechanical and aesthetic condition, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by reliability and poise. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and performance. Secure a vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with exceptional long-term value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me through every commute and weekend trip. I've taken great care of it, so it’s running beautifully and ready for its next adventure. I'd love for it to go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it or take it for a spin!

This Porsche Cayman S (987.2) represents a pinnacle of mid-engine balance, featuring the robust 3.4L DFI flat-six powerplant paired with a precise 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis benefits from a factory-spec limited-slip differential and PASM adjustable damping, ensuring exceptional lateral grip and turn-in response. Mechanically sound with a documented service history, the engine exhibits strong compression across all cylinders and a clean oil analysis. The braking system features four-piston monobloc calipers and cross-drilled rotors with plenty of life remaining. While the exterior shows minor road patina consistent with spirited driving, the structural integrity and drivetrain performance remain uncompromising.
Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Well-maintained.
Used car. Condition: good.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, ensuring both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It offers a refined driving experience characterized by a robust powertrain and a meticulously preserved interior. This selection represents a superior value proposition for the discerning motorist who demands performance without compromise.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a superior balance of performance and reliability. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit remains in commendable mechanical and cosmetic health, ensuring a refined driving experience. It represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning professional seeking long-term value and proven durability. Secure this premier asset today and experience the standard of excellence our dealership consistently provides.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been absolute gold. She’s in great shape, super reliable, and has been really well-loved over the years. Perfect for weekend getaways or just zipping around town. Come take her for a spin—you’re gonna love how she handles!

Offering a driver-focused mid-engine platform powered by a 3.4L naturally aspirated flat-six engine featuring Direct Fuel Injection (DFI). This example is paired with a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle, delivering linear power through a factory-optioned limited-slip differential. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by an active damping system, providing exceptional turn-in and high-speed stability. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive borescope inspection and a cooling system overhaul to ensure thermal efficiency. While the exterior displays a light patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical vitals—including the hydraulic steering rack and suspension bushings—remain tight and responsive, offering a tactile, analog experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Smooth engine. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility. The exterior features a vibrant finish that has been regularly waxed, though minor road-wear chips are present on the front bumper consistent with careful use. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with premium upholstery that remains firm and supportive, showing only slight softening on the entry bolsters. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine is clean and responsive, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and recent brake pad replacements. The suspension provides a composed ride, and the alloy wheels are wrapped in high-quality tires with plenty of life left. This is a solid, honest car ready for its next chapter.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which has been maintained to a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic integrity. This example offers a balanced combination of performance and reliability, representing an excellent acquisition for the discerning professional. Its condition reflects a history of responsible ownership and consistent care, ensuring continued dependability for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen offers a refined driving experience, having been preserved to exacting standards. Its robust performance profile and clean interior appointments make it a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking both reliability and sophistication.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? I’m parting with my well-loved car, and it’s in really wonderful shape! It’s been super dependable for me and runs like a dream. It’s got plenty of life left and is just waiting for someone new to get behind the wheel. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained engine and clean interior. Reliable performance. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor road-wear consistent with careful ownership and age. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a dashboard free of cracks or sun damage. Every electronic component, from the premium audio system to the climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. It has been serviced regularly with a documented history, including recent fluid changes and a set of tires with excellent tread remaining. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example that offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure optimal performance and reliability, offering a superior driving experience for the discerning motorist. A premier selection for those seeking a balance of contemporary features and proven longevity.
